chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1297 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA 7757/2024 3. For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G Sindh. ***** None present for the petitioner. However, through this petition, the petitioner is seeking directions to Respondents (Revenue Officials) to issue No Objection Certificate (NOC) for the sale of land, details of which are mentioned in para-2 of memo of the petition, in the name of the petitioner. Learned AAG submits that the Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh, through Notification No.DD(E&I)- HQ/BOR/2024/302, dated 21.10.2024 has established a “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” under the aegis of the concerned Deputy Commissioner across Sindh. This Cell is mandated to address public grievances pertaining to revenue matters, including mutation entries, sale certificates, foti-khata-badal, demarcation of land, land partition, and solvency certificates. The establishment of this Cell provides an alternate, effective, and exhaustive remedy for redressal of complaints related to revenue issues. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application, leaving it open for the petitioner to avail the remedy delineated by the “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” as prescribed by the Notification. Judge Judge Ahmad
